title: Frozen included-studies register (inclusion/exclusion applied)
context: Applying the pre-registered protocol yields a frozen, versioned list of included studies, each license-cleared before extraction. This task produces that included-studies register. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Produce a frozen, versioned included-studies register with a complete per-study license row and disease-extent / era / regimen / access-status tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Frozen, versioned list with a per-study license row complete before extraction.
Each study tagged by disease extent(s), era, regimen, and OA/closed-access status.
Register is the single source of truth feeding extraction; inclusion/exclusion decisions traceable to the protocol.
